goal: Add budgets, tags, and recurring bills tracking

tasks.name: Create Budget ent schema with monthly tracking
microSteps: Create ent/schema/budget.go: month (string YYYY-MM), amount_cents (int64), rollover (bool, default false)
Add edges: Budget -> Household, Budget -> Category
Add unique index on (household_id, category_id, month)
Create internal/service/budget.go: GetBudgetProgress(householdID, month) returns category budgets with spent amounts
Query spent amounts by summing transaction entries for each category in the month
Write test: create budget, add expenses, verify progress calculation
tasks.action: Define Budget entity tied to a category and month. Budget service calculates progress by summing expense entries per category per month. Supports rollover flag for carry-forward.

tasks.name: Create Tag ent schema with transaction tagging
microSteps: Add edges: Tag -> Household, Tag -> Transactions (many-to-many)
Update Transaction schema to add Tags edge (many-to-many)
tasks.action: Define Tag entity for flexible transaction labeling. Many-to-many relationship with transactions. Tags are household-scoped.

tasks.name: Create RecurringBill ent schema with status tracking
microSteps: Create ent/schema/recurring_bill.go: name, amount_cents, due_day (int 1-31), frequency enum (monthly|weekly|annual), status enum (paid|pending|overdue)
Add edges: RecurringBill -> Household, RecurringBill -> Category
Create internal/service/bills.go: UpdateBillStatuses(householdID) — marks bills overdue if past due_day and not paid
Add GraphQL query: recurringBills(householdID) with filtering by status
tasks.action: Define RecurringBill entity for monthly bills tracking (rent, KPLC, Netflix). Bills have a due day and status (paid/pending/overdue). Service auto-marks overdue bills.

commitMessage: feat(household-ledger): add budgets, tags, and recurring bills
